title: Terrestria, Traverse & Cinderscape Recipe Compat
description: Adds recipe compatibility between Terrestria, Traverse & Cinderscapes, and other mods like Farmer's Delight and Create.
body:
# Description
This is a datapack that adds recipe compatibility between 
[Terrestria](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrestria), 
[Traverse](https://modrinth.com/mod/traverse) & 
[Cinderscapes](https://modrinth.com/mod/cinderscapes), and other mods like 
[Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric)
([Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) in 1.20.1) and 
[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric).
by adding a series of recipes.

# Features
Recipes added by the datapack are as follows:
- You can process woods and logs in the 3 mods on FD's Cutting Board or Create's Mechanical Saw, including quarter logs and small-sized logs;
- Indian Paintbrush can be cut into dyes like vanilla flowers;
- You can tear doors, trapdoors and signs into planks;
- ...and more!
